name: Third party caused my injury at work in Centerville, sue them too?
description: Yes, sue third party separately after comp.[3]

mainEntity.name: Third party caused my injury at work in Centerville, sue them too?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue third party separately after comp.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers comp doesn't bar third-party civil suits.[3] Key factors: Comp for employer part; court for others.[3] Preserve evidence.[3] Lawyer coordinates.[3]
